1. Convert String to Uppercase
   
   public class UpperCaseExample 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "hello world";
        System.out.println(s.toUpperCase());
    }
   }
   

2. Convert String to Lowercase

   public class LowerCaseExample 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "HELLO WORLD";
        System.out.println(s.toLowerCase());
    }
   }
   

3. Find Length of a String

   public class StringLength 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "Java Programming";
        System.out.println("Length: " + s.length());
    }
   }
   

4. Compare Two Strings (equals)
   
   public class CompareStrings 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String a = "hello";
        String b = "hello";

        if (a.equals(b))
            System.out.println("Equal");
        else
            System.out.println("Not Equal");
    }
   }
   
   
5. Compare Without Case (equalsIgnoreCase)

   public class CompareIgnoreCase 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String a = "Hello";
        String b = "hello";

        System.out.println(a.equalsIgnoreCase(b));
    }
   }
   
   
6. Concatenate Two Strings
   
   public class ConcatStrings 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String a = "Hello ";
        String b = "World";

        System.out.println(a + b); 
    }
   }
   
   
7. Extract Substring
   
   public class SubstringExample 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "Java Programming";
        System.out.println(s.substring(5));        // from index 5
        System.out.println(s.substring(0, 4));     // from 0 to 3
    }
   }
   
8. Find Character at Position
   
   public class CharAtExample
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "Java";
        System.out.println(s.charAt(2));            // prints 'v'
    }
   }
   
9. Replace Characters
   
   public class ReplaceExample 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "banana";
        System.out.println(s.replace('a', 'o'));      // bonono
    }
   }
   
   
10. Check If a String Contains a Word
   
   public class ContainsExample 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "Java programming is fun";
        System.out.println(s.contains("fun"));
    }
   }
   
11. Trim Leading and Trailing Spaces
   
   public class TrimExample 
   {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "   Hello Java   ";
        System.out.println(s.trim());
    }
   }
   
12. Split a String Into Words
  
  public class SplitExample 
  {
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "Java is fun";
        String[] words = s.split(" ");

        for (int i = 0; i < words.length; i++) 
		{
            System.out.println(words[i]);
        }
    }
   }

13. Print SpecialCharacter

    package StringMethods;
    public class SpecialCharacter
	{
      public static void main(String[] args) 
	  {
		String values="abc#123";
		//String[] a=values.split("#");
		for(int i = 0; i<=values.length()-1; i++) 
		{
			if(!Character.isLetterOrDigit(values.charAt(i))) 
			{
				System.out.println(values.charAt(i));
			}
		}
	  }
	}
	
14. Convert String to Character Array

    public class ToCharArrayExample 
	{
    public static void main(String[] args) 
	{
        String s = "Java";
        char[] arr = s.toCharArray();

        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) 
		{
            System.out.println(arr[i]);
        }
    }
   }
   
15. Convert Character Array to String

    public class CharArrayToString 
	{
     public static void main(String[] args)
	 {
        char[] arr = {'J', 'A', 'V', 'A'};
        String s = new String(arr);
        System.out.println(s);
      }
     }

16. Check if String Starts With a Word
    
	public class StartsWithExample 
	{
      public static void main(String[] args) 
	  {
        String s = "Java programming";
        System.out.println(s.startsWith("Java"));
      }
    }

17. Check if String Ends With a Word
    
	public class EndsWithExample 
	{
      public static void main(String[] args)
	  {
        String s = "Hello World";
        System.out.println(s.endsWith("World"));
       }
    }
	
18. Count Number of Words in a String

    public class CountNumberOfStrings 
	{
       public static void main(String[] args)
	   {
	    String a="I learn Java Programs and also softwsre testing ";
		String[] word=a.split(" ");
		System.out.println(a.length());    //count all the characters
		System.out.println(word.length);    //count how many words
        }
	}
	
19. Print CommonString Words

    public class CommonString 
     {
       public static void main(String[] args)
	   {
		String a="hai this is divya";
		String b="hai this a QA Program";
		String[] s1=a.split(" ");
		String[] s2=b.split(" ");
		
		for(int i=0; i<s1.length; i++)
		{
			for(int j=0; j<s2.length; j++)
			{
				if(s1[i].equals(s2[i]))
				{
					System.out.println(s1[i]);
					break;
				}
			}
		}

	    }

     }
	 
20. Write a java program to find the given String is palindrome or not?

     public class CheckPalindrome 
	 {
	    public static void main(String[] Args)
	   {
		//String a="abcdabcd";
		  String a="abcba";
		  String b="";
		
		  System.out.println(a.length());
		  for(int i=a.length()-1; i>=0; i--)
		    {
			b=b+a.charAt(i);
		    }
		   if(a.equals(b))
		     {
			    System.out.println("This is palindrome");
		      }
		   else
		    {
			    System.out.println("This is not a palindrome");
		    }
	    }
	}
	
21. Total String will reverse

     public class StringReverse 
	 {
        public static void main(String[] args) {
		String a="My name is Divya";
		System.out.println(" The number of words are in given string: "+a.length());
        System.out.println(a);
        for(int i=a.length()-1; i>=0; i--)
        {
        	System.out.print(a.charAt(i));
        	
        }
       }
	   
22. Write a program to print each word in reverse order in a string?

       public class WordreverseOrder 
	   {
	     public static void main(String[] args)
	      {
	         String str=" My name is Divya";
			 String rev="";
			 String[] arr=str.split(" ");
			 System.out.println(str.length());
			  for(int i=0; i<=arr.length-1; i++)
	       {
		       String a=arr[i];
		         for(int j=a.length()-1; j>=0; j--)
		       {
			     rev=rev+a.charAt(j);
		       }
	       }
	  
	     System.out.println(rev);
	    }
      }

23.Count Digits, Letters, Spaces 
      public class CountTypes 
	  {
         public static void main(String[] args)
		 {
            String s = "Hello 123 World";
            int letters = 0, digits = 0, spaces = 0;

            for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) 
			{
            char c = s.charAt(i);
             if (Character.isDigit(c)) digits++;
             else if (Character.isLetter(c)) letters++;
             else if (Character.isWhitespace(c)) spaces++;
         }

        System.out.println("Letters: " + letters);
        System.out.println("Digits: " + digits);
        System.out.println("Spaces: " + spaces);
        }
       }
	   
24. Count Vowels & Consonants

     public class CountVowelsConsonants 
	 {
       public static void main(String[] args) 
	   {
        String s = "Hello World";
        int vowels = 0, consonants = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) 
		{
            char c = s.charAt(i);

            if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z' || c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z')
			{
                if ("aeiouAEIOU".indexOf(c) != -1)
                    vowels++;
                else
                    consonants++;
            }
        }
            System.out.println("Vowels: " + vowels);
            System.out.println("Consonants: " + consonants);
          }
        }
